title: The transition to quantum-safe cryptography
summary: Centre for Cyber Security (CFCS) theme page on the transition to quantum-safe cryptography, explaining post-quantum/PQC concepts and the migration of Danish organisations to quantum-resistant algorithms.

title: The transition to quantum-safe cryptography
summary: Theme page from the Danish Agency for Societal Security (Styrelsen for Samfundssikkerhed/SAMSIK) on the transition to quantum-safe cryptography; appears to be the same content as the CFCS page on the agency's newer domain. Flagged for review because samsik.dk is not yet on the trusted-domains list.

title: Grund- og nærhedsnotat on the recommendation for a coordinated implementation plan for the transition to post-quantum cryptography
summary: Danish Parliament (Folketinget) background and subsidiarity note in which the government welcomes the recommendation and supports a coordinated effort on the transition to quantum-safe cryptography in the EU.

title: Council meeting samlenotat referencing 5G/6G and quantum-safe cryptography
summary: Danish Parliament (Folketinget) consolidated note for an EU Council meeting noting cybersecurity and resilience conclusions, including 5G/6G and quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Global tensions, rising house prices and the cyber threat dominate the risk picture
summary: Danish central bank (Nationalbanken) risk report stating that preparations for implementing quantum-safe cryptography in the financial sector should be strengthened.

title: National Strategy for Quantum Technology
issuingOrg: Ministry of Industry, Business and Financial Affairs
summary: Danish national strategy for quantum technology development. Flagged for review because the candidate text describes quantum technology broadly and does not clearly contain an explicit post-quantum/QSC cryptography migration reference.

title: Nyt sekretariat i CFCS skal hjælpe organisationer med at overgå til kvantesikker kryptografi
summary: Centre for Cyber Security (CFCS) news announcing a new secretariat (under the national quantum technology strategy) to help authorities and companies in Denmark's critical digital infrastructure transition to quantum-safe cryptography. Distinct from the CFCS theme page already in the corpus.

title: Ny temaartikel: Overgangen til kvantesikker kryptografi
summary: Centre for Cyber Security (CFCS) news item launching its theme article on the transition to quantum-safe cryptography, explaining the quantum threat and proposed steps to migrate to post-quantum cryptography. Separate news URL from the theme page already stored.
